questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Fulton Hogan and/or Avionics.

questions.section: Questions for airports or buyers of AGL and airside civil construction services
questions.text: Who do you see as the suppliers that can meet your needs for each of AGL services, and airside civil construction services?

questions.section: Questions for airports or buyers of AGL and airside civil construction services
questions.text: Are there any particular qualifications that a supplier needs to provide AGL or airside civil construction services at your airport?

questions.section: Questions for airports or buyers of AGL and airside civil construction services
questions.text: What are the main factors that determine your choice of AGL or airside civil construction services supplier? For example, price, tender terms, contractual terms, affiliation with an airfield control and monitoring system (CMS)?
Identify your customers and head contractors of AGL services and the percentage of your total services supplied to each.
Identify whether you have tendered for work with Fulton Hogan as head contractor. If so, what was the result?

questions.section: Questions for airside and civil construction businesses
questions.text: Identify your suppliers of AGL services and the percentage of your total AGL spend supplied by each.

questions.section: Questions for airside and civil construction businesses
questions.text: What are the main factors that determine your choice of AGL supplier? For example, price, tender terms, contractual terms, affiliation with an airfield control and monitoring system (CMS)?

questions.section: Questions for airside and civil construction businesses
questions.text: Describe what would be required for your business to expand into the provision of AGL services.

questions.section: Questions for airside and civil construction businesses
questions.text: Outline the effect on your business’ ability to compete and tender for airside construction projects should your business’ access to Avionics’ AGL services be reduced/dimished.

Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition, including any views or concerns on the effect of the Acquisition on competition in Australia.
